title: Genesis of Titans
description: Rise as a Legend in a World of Awakening Ancients! Genesis of Titans is a massive RPG collection for Fabric 1.20.1
body:
⚔️ Genesis of Titans ⚔️
Rise as a Legend in a World of Awakening Ancients!
Genesis of Titans is a massive RPG collection for Fabric 1.20.1 that reimagines Minecraft as a high-fantasy epic. Explore boundless lands, master forgotten spells, and challenge entities whose power rivals the gods themselves.
✨ Key Features:
🛡️ True RPG Progression: Choose your destiny with RPG Series and Origins. Play as a powerful Wizard, a holy Paladin, or a nimble Rogue.
⚔️ Dynamic Combat: Experience fluid, soul-like combat with Better Combat and Simply Swords. Every swing feels impactful with custom animations and dodge rolls! :3
🌍 Breathtaking Exploration: Witness world generation like never before with Terralith and Tectonic. Explore completely overhauled structures by YUNG’s and massive dungeons filled with loot.
👹 Titanic Bosses: Test your might against the colossi of Bosses of Mass Destruction, Aquamirae, and AdventureZ. Only the strongest will survive! 3:<
🎒 Masterful Engineering: From Sophisticated Backpacks to legendary Artifacts, your gear will evolve alongside your journey.
🌸 Aesthetics & Immersion: Meet new companions (including unique mob variants :D) and enjoy a living world powered by Visuality, Sound Physics, and AmbientSounds.
